brands.name: Ohm Fitness

statesOpen.note: Area representative deal to develop 20 EMS fitness studios throughout North Carolina (PR dated 2023-03-24)

Additional development announced in 2022-23 press for AZ, CO, KS, MO, South FL, DC and San Diego, but those releases are undated on accessible pages so only verifiable states are listed.

nationwide.note: Accepting franchise inquiries from all 50 US states + DC; ~1,300 US studios. Caveat: development opportunities are limited — most growth goes to existing franchise owners (<0.1% of inquirers franchise).

brands.name: Pet Evolution
brands.note: No published state-availability evidence found. Franchisor site (petevolutionfranchising.com) says only 'key markets across the nation' with no state list, and the FranchiseDirect listing (franchisedirect.com/pet-franchises/pet-evolution/) shows 'This company is not accepting inquiries at this time' as of June 2026. Honest gap — availability unverified.

brands.name: Planet Fitness
brands.note: Not currently selling new franchises to new US candidates. Franchising.com listing (franchising.com/planetfitness/) states 'Planet Fitness is not currently accepting new applicants' (2026); industry sources report US growth is driven by existing multi-unit franchisees via Area Development Agreements, with new-candidate opportunities focused internationally. 2,896 clubs in all 50 states as of Dec 2025.

nationwide.note: 'Territories and development rights are available throughout the United States and franchise incentives are available to qualified candidates'; accepting inquiries from all 50 states + DC. Franchisor portal: franchising.popeyes.com.

brands.name: QC Kinetix
brands.note: Franchise development was frozen for ~1 year from July 2024 after a sharp contraction; QC Kinetix relaunched franchise sales in Sept 2025 targeting 50 new franchise owners and 120 new clinics over 24 months in unspecified 'high-potential markets' (franchise.org: https://www.franchise.org/2025/09/qc-kinetix-relaunches-strategic-franchise-expansion-following-comprehensive-brand-transformation/ ; Franchise Times: 'Regenerative Medicine Franchise QC Kinetix Stages Comeback After Backslide'). No published state-availability list found, so no states/nationwide claim recorded.
